description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image globally and overrides it with node:8 for the build-project job. Cache the node_modules directory, and add a build-project job that runs only on the master and develop branches, executing the following shell commands in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c \"grunt test\"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c \"grunt release\". The job stores coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts that expire after one day and captures test coverage using the regex /Lines\\s*:\\s*(\\d+\\.\\d+)%/. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on master, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after ninety days.
